## Description

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Maintenance / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated as needed
- [ ] Docs updated (README/CHANGELOG/inline docs)
- [ ] Python and TypeScript parity maintained (if applicable)
- [ ] CI passes

## Related issues

Link issues or discussions here.
